calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Continued To Nov-12-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge. Plaintiff Ray Gajiwala appeared in pro per and there being no appearance by Defendant John Sears, the Court orders the matter off the settlement conference calendar and the request for jury trial is sricken. The trial date is confirmed.
